title: Officials set to revise MiCA to cover non-EU stablecoin issuers: Report
summary: Officials set to revise MiCA to cover non-EU stablecoin issuers: Report
briefing: EU officials reportedly plan to consider changes to the Markets in Crypto-Assets framework, dubbed by some as “MiCA 2.0,” in response to a US stablecoin law and rules on tokenized payments and deposits.

title: Bitcoin peels back to $62K as Fed-wary futures traders cut risk: Is the BTC rally over?
summary: Bitcoin peels back to $62K as Fed-wary futures traders cut risk: Is the BTC rally over?
briefing: Bitcoin hovered around the $62,000 mark following a spike in oil prices, escalating hot war in Iran and traders’ move to cut risk ahead of a Federal Reserve policy statement.

title: Adam Back’s Bitcoin treasury company seeks new terms with Cantor for SPAC merger
summary: Adam Back’s Bitcoin treasury company seeks new terms with Cantor for SPAC merger
briefing: The Bitcoin Standard Treasury Company and Cantor Equity Partners I announced that they were looking into amending the terms of a 2025 merger deal that “better reflected market conditions.”

title: Stablecoin-settled TradFi perpetual trading tops $1.1T: Binance Research
summary: Stablecoin-settled TradFi perpetual trading tops $1.1T: Binance Research
briefing: A new Binance Research report said stablecoins are fast becoming a preferred settlement layer for tokenized TradFi markets while gaining traction in payments and savings.

title: Bank of England governor denies Farage lobbying swayed CBDC policy: Report
summary: Bank of England governor denies Farage lobbying swayed CBDC policy: Report
briefing: Andrew Bailey reportedly said Bank of England policy remained independent after a meeting with Nigel Farage that included discussions on cryptocurrency.

title: Bitcoin slides as Iran ceasefire collapse sees $75 oil on Hormuz blockade threats
summary: Bitcoin slides as Iran ceasefire collapse sees $75 oil on Hormuz blockade threats
briefing: Bitcoin price pressure took BTC toward the "crucial" $61,000 mark as oil prices soared on the collapse of the US-Iran ceasefire.

title: Bull Bitcoin asks French court to strike down DAC8 implementing decree
summary: Bull Bitcoin asks French court to strike down DAC8 implementing decree
briefing: The non-custodial Bitcoin exchange petitioned to annul a French decree implementing DAC8, arguing the rules could create surveillance and physical risks for up to 135 million European crypto holders.

title: India crypto tax filings lag trading activity: Report
summary: India crypto tax filings lag trading activity: Report
briefing: India’s tax department reportedly found that fewer than a quarter of the 645,000 people who made crypto transactions reported them on tax returns.

title: Bitcoin ETFs 'Turning a Corner' After Record Bleed Hits $8 Billion
summary: Bitcoin ETFs 'Turning a Corner' After Record Bleed Hits $8 Billion
briefing: Investors had backed away from Bitcoin since mid-May.

title: Lucky Trader Turns $85 Into $2 Million on Robinhood Chain Meme Coin
summary: Lucky Trader Turns $85 Into $2 Million on Robinhood Chain Meme Coin
briefing: The meme coin CashCat on Robinhood Chain is the latest flavor of the hour, and one trader has turned a mini-investment into a small fortune in less than three weeks.

title: BNB Chain Plans New Layer-1 for AI Agents and Quantum Future
summary: BNB Chain Plans New Layer-1 for AI Agents and Quantum Future
briefing: The network’s 2026 roadmap targets faster transactions, AI-powered apps, and infrastructure aimed at competing with traditional financial systems, while preparing for a quantum future.

title: XRP Logo Lands on Kansas Jayhawks Jerseys as Ripple Inks Multi-Year Deal
summary: XRP Logo Lands on Kansas Jayhawks Jerseys as Ripple Inks Multi-Year Deal
briefing: Ripple and XRP become the latest crypto brands to enter the sports marketing space.

title: Malaysia Seizes Over 75,000 Crypto Mining Rigs in Power-Theft Crackdown
summary: Malaysia Seizes Over 75,000 Crypto Mining Rigs in Power-Theft Crackdown
briefing: More than 3,000 raids since 2022 have led to 629 arrests, as authorities target miners siphoning electricity from the national grid.

title: Kraken Wins $22M From Auditor That Abandoned It During Operation Choke Point 2.0
summary: Kraken Wins $22M From Auditor That Abandoned It During Operation Choke Point 2.0
briefing: The crypto exchange says an arbitrator sided with it after accounting firm Mazars walked away from a nearly finished audit.

title: Morning Minute: Vanguard Hires 'Head of Digital Assets' in Crypto Capitulation
summary: Morning Minute: Vanguard Hires 'Head of Digital Assets' in Crypto Capitulation
briefing: Crypto majors fall as the U.S. strikes Iran, ending the ceasefire. Vanguard opens its doors. And a meme coin frenzy erupts on Robinhood chain.

title: Bankers Filed Suspicious Activity Report Over Farage's £5M Gift From Tether Billionaire
summary: Bankers Filed Suspicious Activity Report Over Farage's £5M Gift From Tether Billionaire
briefing: The report, filed in May 2024, invited the National Crime Agency to determine whether there were grounds for further investigation.
